problem_text_cn: 1418 氢气中混有氦气，氢原子光谱中混入了氦离子（He⁺）谱线。在不测量谱线波长的情况下，直接从照片上判断哪些是氢光谱，哪些是He⁺光谱，并说明判断依据。
problem_text_en: 1418 Hydrogen gas is mixed with helium, causing He⁺ ion lines to appear in the hydrogen atomic spectrum. Without measuring the wavelengths of the spectral lines, determine which lines belong to hydrogen and which to He⁺ directly from the photograph, and explain the basis for your judgment.
img_cn: 图1418_1：毕克林线系与氢巴耳末线系对比
img_en: Fig. 1418_1: Comparison of Pickering series and hydrogen Balmer series
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】氢原子波数公式$\tilde{\nu}_\text{H} = R_\text{H}\left(\frac{1}{m^2} - \frac{1}{n^2}\right)$，He⁺的波数公式为$\tilde{\nu}_\text{He} = R_\text{He}Z^2\left(\frac{1}{m^2} - \frac{1}{n^2}\right) = R_\text{He}\left(\frac{1}{(m/2)^2} - \frac{1}{(n/2)^2}\right)$（$Z=2$）。当He⁺的量子数$(m/2)_\text{He} = (m)_\text{H}$、$(n/2)_\text{He} = (n)_\text{H}$时，谱线几乎重合，但He⁺的波数略大；其余He⁺谱线位于氢谱线之间，且光谱强度和间隔向波数大方向递减，可据此区分。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The hydrogen wavenumber formula is $\tilde{\nu}_\text{H} = R_\text{H}\left(\frac{1}{m^2} - \frac{1}{n^2}\right)$, while for He⁺ it is $\tilde{\nu}_\text{He} = R_\text{He}Z^2\left(\frac{1}{m^2} - \frac{1}{n^2}\right) = R_\text{He}\left(\frac{1}{(m/2)^2} - \frac{1}{(n/2)^2}\right)$ ($Z=2$). When He⁺ quantum numbers satisfy $(m/2)_\text{He} = (m)_\text{H}$ and $(n/2)_\text{He} = (n)_\text{H}$, lines nearly coincide but He⁺ wavenumbers are slightly larger. Other He⁺ lines lie between hydrogen lines, and intensity/interval decrease toward larger wavenumbers, allowing distinction.
problem_answer: 几乎重合的双线中，波数略小的是氢谱线，略大的是He⁺谱线；位于氢谱线之间的谱线均为He⁺光谱。依据是He⁺的波数公式中$Z=2$，导致其谱线位置与氢谱线部分重合但波数略大，且额外谱线填充在氢谱线之间。
